name: treasury-billpay-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the treasury-billpay-agent starter. Higher cap than other starters because real invoices are larger than per-call API spend. The cap and approval threshold are the primary safety controls; the system prompt's anomaly-detection layer catches outliers before they reach the policy.
notes: $25 approval threshold catches anything that's not a small recurring sub. Tune up or down based on your typical invoice size.
$200/24h cap bounds blast radius — even if a bug or prompt injection triggers many small payments, total spend is capped per period.

Allowlisted services (gates which registered SaaS / vendor services the agent may pay) are managed in the Canopy dashboard. Allowlists key on registered service slug, so they apply best when you're paying recurring SaaS subscriptions that exist in the registry.
